description: Pre-registered expectations for the core skill model, pinned from the Cliometrica manuscript (section 2.3). Mismatches are findings.
notes: mu_1968 pinned at -0.036 (Year of the Pitcher), mu_1930 at +0.037 (live-ball peak), 1968->1969 jump +0.026 (mound lowered), full span 0.073. Tolerances allow for the slightly different filter cascade after Stage 1 revisions. tau outputs are PA-weighted mean-anchored; age curves anchored at 28.
